_comment: Canonical teleport-detector baseline for the regression gate. Reproducible because the capture is SEEDED (see _teleport_capture.js). The gate (_teleport_gate.sh) fails if 'egregious' exceeds this number. To re-baseline after an intentional improvement: run the gate, confirm the lower number, and update 'egregious'/'flags'/'commit' here in the same commit.
note: Egregious 8 -> 4 and NEW runaway class baselined at 4 (>=20yd late-sprint threshold; stable across 3 runs) after the sack hold-base fix: the LB-scrape / DL-engaged-hold offsets read _lastRenderedX (re-synced to the rendered spot every frame by Stage 4) as their base, so 'total drift' offsets integrated per-frame -- defenders accelerating to ~48yd/s and pinning at the field edge after sacks (user-reported runaway; every step under the teleport cap, caught only by the RUNAWAY class: >=16yd late sprint ending >=24yd from the dead ball). Residual 4 runaway = receivers finishing deep routes on long completions (21-42yd), no edge-pinning; the 16-17yd route-finish cluster sits below the threshold so wall-clock pose-sim jitter cannot flip the count.
